seo.title: Live It Up - High-Energy Workout with Shaun T
seo.description: Live It Up is week of high-energy workouts designed to bring you joy and positivity. Reset your mind with trainer Shaun T and sign up here today!

trainers.bioBodi: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

data.descriptionShort: Keep the joy going with these high-energy, dance conditioning workouts.
data.descriptionLong: Keep living your best life with a week of high-energy workouts that bring even more joy and positivity to your day. Shaun T designed these to be done on their own or added to your LET’S GET UP! program.

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required
commerce.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

modules.categories: Dance, Bodyweight Training, Weight Loss, Cardio

modules.title: What are the workouts like?
modules.content: LIVE IT UP! includes four 30-minute dance workouts that keep the energy going with new choreography, remixed songs, and the LET’S GET UP! cameo tool. Shaun’s fun moves and inspirational messages are an instant mood booster that help you celebrate your body as you get fit and healthy. The LIVE IT UP! workouts can be done on their own or added to your LET’S GET UP! program.

trainers.bio: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.
